title: Cyber Support Engineer (Carbon Black EDR)
description:
• Maintain and operate Carbon Black EDR servers hosted on RHEL 8.
  • Perform scheduled maintenance tasks (OS, database, application level), including patching, health checks, backups, and service restarts under approved change windows.
  • Validate and maintain EDR application services and log forwarding to designated log collectors.
  • Monitor and resolve stale services, queues, or indexing issues.
  • Review system, security, and audit logs not forwarded to the designated log collection server.
  • Engage OEM for troubleshooting and professional services when required.
  • Monitor health and connectivity of all deployed sensors.
  • Troubleshoot offline sensors, validate network paths, inspect local service states, and collect diagnostic data.
  • Support redeployment or recovery of corrupted/missing sensor components.
  • Assist in onboarding new hosts and validate sensor information against asset inventory.
  • Validate port connectivity, firewall rules, and SSL certificate issues for endpoint integration.
  • Troubleshoot endpoints in air-gapped networks using static resolving techniques.
  • Analyze intermittent or unstable site connectivity issues.
  • Ensure OS hardening (RHEL CIS baseline) and compliance with organizational hardening guides.
  • Monitor and apply security patches within stipulated timelines.
  • Conduct quarterly user access reviews and annual system configuration audits.
  • Maintain cryptographic key lifecycle management.
  • Comply with cybersecurity instructions issued by relevant authorities.
  • Provide technical support for escalated issues and assist in cybersecurity investigations.
  • Retrieve endpoint data, logs, and telemetry for forensic or operational queries.
  • Produce maintenance reports after each cycle, including system health, performance metrics, patch status, and outstanding actions.
  • Maintain SOPs, asset inventory, configuration notes, and troubleshooting guides.
  • Raise and document change requests according to organizational change management processes.

Mandatory Technical Skills

  • Hands-on experience with Carbon Black EDR or equivalent platforms.
  • min 3 years of experience as a Cyber Support Engineer
  • Strong RHEL system administration skills (RHEL 8/9).
  • Familiarity with PostgreSQL maintenance (backup, restore, health checks).
  • Network troubleshooting (TCP, TLS, proxies, firewalls).
  • Endpoint diagnostics for EDR sensors on Windows.
  • Knowledge of secure operations and privileged account handling.

Good-to-Have Skills

  • Experience with CIS Benchmarks for RHEL and Windows.
  • Knowledge of log management/SIEM integration.
  • Understanding of OT networks and remote plant architectures.

Preferred Certifications

  • RHCSA / RHCE
  • VMware Certification for Carbon Black EDR

postedCompany.description:
Unisoft Infotech is a leading provider of integrated business solutions. The solutions leverage the use of industry expertise and leading edge technologies to focus on delivering innovative solutions to clients globally.

Unisoft Infotech has offices and operations in Singapore and India and served customers in Asia-Pacific, Middle-East-Asia, Africa, and USA. Unisoft is a knowledge leader in several industry verticals.

Established in 1995 Unisoft has been associated with over 200 projects in 12 countries. With over 1500 man-years of knowledge base and extensive experience in serving big organizations and MEs in the region, Unisoft is built on the pillars of innovation, quality and customer service.

Unisoft Infotech has strong skills, experience and knowledge in improving business competiveness of the customers by implementing ensuring perfect processes with automation using ERP solution and beyond.

Unisoft Infotech is a pioneer in SAP implementations in the mid market and was the first to sign the ME partnership agreement, to deliver strategic functional and consulting services to Mid-market customers in India, Taiwan & Singapore. With several certified, successfully implemented solutions and certified support infrastructure, Unisoft Infotech is a leading enterprise solutions partner.
postedCompany.name: UNISOFT INFOTECH PTE LTD
